rule_metadata.name: AuroraStealer
rule_metadata.author: RussianPanda
rule_metadata.description: Detects the Build/Group IDs if present / detects an unobfuscated AuroraStealer binary; tested on version 22.12.2022

rules.rule_text:
rule AuroraStealer
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects the Build/Group IDs if present / detects an unobfuscated AuroraStealer binary; tested on version 22.12.2022"
		date = "2/7/2023"

	strings:
		$b1 = { 48 8D 0D ?? ?? 04 00 E8 ?? ?? EF FF }
		$go = "Go build ID"
		$machineid = "MachineGuid"

	condition:
		all of them
}
